summary: Completed testing of Ideas Mode UI fixes. All major issues reported by user have been resolved - minimum 3 idea cards are now visible (BTC, ETH, SOL), scroll functionality is enabled, chart height provides good symmetry, and Accuracy card is compact and functional.

design_issues.issue: Chart height is 372px instead of expected 400px
design_issues.impact: Minor - still provides good symmetry with left panel

passed_tests: Ideas functionality accessible via Tech Analysis -> Ideas navigation
Accuracy card displays 50% with W:1 L:1 All:3 stats pattern
IDEAS list shows minimum 3 cards visible (BTC, ETH, SOL)
IDEAS list has scroll enabled (overflow-y: auto)
Left and right panels are height balanced
Idea cards show complete information (Evolution, Core Insight, Probability, Key Levels)
BTC card shows Rectangle → Triangle evolution pattern
ETH card shows Ascending Triangle pattern (Active status)
SOL card shows Head And Shoulders pattern (Wrong status)
Chart displays with appropriate dimensions for layout symmetry
Detail panel loads with comprehensive idea information
Probability section shows AI Breakout/Breakdown percentages
Key Levels section displays Breakout and Invalidation prices
